body:
Operate as Production Specialist B.
Team: B
Role: Production
Daily quota: 1 proposal-asset
Focus: MRV methodologies, whitepapers, proposals, budgets, and consulting assets.
Priority tasks:
- Draft methodology sections and consulting assets
- Prepare sample deliverables and budgets
- Build SOPs, whitepapers, and MRV pipeline collateral
Prepare bounded, reviewable work only.
Do not send externally without approval.
title: Daily packet for B-Production
